text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! I don't wanna!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway when I<n>suddenly
hear a loud, defiant cry.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna do any extra classes! I<n>can get
good test scores even without<n>them!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wh-what do you want?! Are yougonna tell me I need extra classesjust like my teacher?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, I don't WANNA! It shouldn't<n>even be such
a big deal that I was late<n>to class 'cause I was
practicing my<n>magic!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho! Come back to the<n>class right now,
young lady!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wha?! She's coming! What should I<n>do?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Like I said! I. Don't. Wannaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, she's going to find me at this<n>rate! I need
to find a way to...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aha!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: SHHH! Be quiet! Just stand right<n>there!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho! Where are you?<n>Sweep Tosho!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. She's gone.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ You're pretty useful as a<n>wall, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You keep what happened here a<n>secret, and I'll
make sure your job as<n>a wall stays safe, eh?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: ...Seems like my "wall" days aren't<n>over yet.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I-I was thinking that too! There's no<n>way she
can outrun me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's not long before I glimpse Sweep<n>Tosho
through the windows, dashing<n>away at top
speed.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! That was a cinch! ♪ Let's<n>see her try to
catch me now!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What's going on here?

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Air Groove! Am I glad to see you!<n>This young
lady is trying to weasel her<n>way out of attending
her<n>supplementary classes.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No way! No, no, noooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see. What a stroke of luck that<n>you decided
to stop here.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nooooo! I don't wanna! Let me go!<n>LEMME
GOOO!
